image_prompt: Infographic checklist layout in a clean corporate style. Bold top headline reads 'ACTIVE IS NOT FINDABLE.' with a subline 'Your SAM.gov registration is on the timer — not on the buyer's screen.' Five numbered checklist items down the left side, each with a green checkmark icon: 1) NAICS Codes Match Live Solicitations, 2) Capability Narrative Mirrors Agency Keywords, 3) Reps & Certs Reviewed Every 90 Days, 4) POC Email Goes to a Monitored Inbox, 5) Exclusion Check Pulled Same Day as Quote. On the right side, an illustrated professional woman in a blazer holds a clipboard, pointing at a laptop screen showing a SAM.gov profile with a magnifying glass overlay. Bottom-right corner shows a small 'APPROVED' stamp. Footer reads 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'. Use a navy and gold color palette with white background.
